mechanism_summary: AFLFast FAST schedule multiplies mutation budget for rarely-hit coverage buckets; rare seeds with partial 'Host:' header receive more havoc mutations and more often complete the required literal, unlike minimizer's flat calibration energy.
one_line: AFLFast rare-bucket energy boost completes Host header via extra havoc

mechanism_summary: AFLFast n_fuzz-based perf_score boost concentrates havoc budget on the rarely-exercised cookie path; minimizer's calibration-only scheduling provides no rarity-weighted amplification, leaving the rare path under-mutated.
one_line: AFLFast rarity schedule amplifies havoc on rare cookie-path seeds
